creator: fehr@regolith.net
text:
/stand/sysinstall does not properly map device names to hex for certain devices.  For example, drive ID #11 on the SCSI chain is refered to as da10, rather than da0a.

Fix: 

Convert the number to hex.
How-To-Repeat: Set a drive to device ID > 10, try to label and partition using sysinstall.
